title: 收敛提交后的 no-active cockpit 状态

sources.reason: Defines no_active_work_item and generated status semantics.
Defines the repair command for stale post-commit no-active status.

problemStatement: After an archive commit, current_status.md can retain the pre-commit transient worktree signal and fail no-active consistency until the generated status is repaired.

riskAssessment.reason: This Work Item only records a generated status refresh; it does not change runtime code or guard logic.

executionDecision.reason: The stale generated artifact is reproducibly repaired by the existing command and can be verified by status consistency and ownership checks.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the committed no-active status reports no transient worktree changes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Generated no-active status reports absent worktree changes after the commit.
Status consistency and ownership checks pass on the clean worktree.
The generated status refresh is archived with its Summary evidence.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The generated no-active status still reflects transient changes from before the N10 archive commit.
constraints: Use the existing status repair generator; do not hand-edit generated output.
Do not modify archived N10 evidence or rewrite history.
intent.rationale: A clean committed baseline must have a truthful no-active Cockpit status so subsequent ownership checks start from a stable state.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly instructed the autonomous remediation loop to continue through final cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
